message:
fix(codegen): Mark exception-assigned variables as mutable

Variables that are assigned from exception handlers (e.g., `e = exc`
where `exc` is from `except X as exc:`) were incorrectly declared
as `const` because they weren't tracked in func_local_mutations.

This caused compilation errors when the variable was later assigned to.

Now check `is_exception_assigned` flag when determining mutability.
